creator: sm@xnc.com
text:
The FreeBSD port of kodi is still on kodi 17.6, while kodi 18 was released in January. I emailed the maintainer to ask if he was still going to update the port and he replied that he would not:

> From: Mickaël Maillot <mickael.maillot@gmail.com>
> To: Stephan Muhs <sm@xnc.com>
> Subject: Re: FreeBSD Port - KODI
> Date: Mon, 30 Sep 2019 21:07:59 +0200
> 
> Obviously no, you can use the kodi-devel port
> 
> Le lun. 30 sept. 2019 à 20:59, Stephan Muhs <sm@xnc.com> a écrit :
>> Hello Mickael,
>> 
>> I was wondering if you are still maintaining this port, as KODI 18 has been 
>> released in January and we are still at 17.6. Please advise.
>>
>> Thanks,
>>
>> Stephan

Please return the port to the pool.
